SEARCH
Package org.javalabs.jpa.meta

Class IdentifiableTypeImpl<X>

java.lang.Object
org.javalabs.jpa.meta.TypeImpl<X>
org.javalabs.jpa.meta.ManagedTypeImpl<X>
org.javalabs.jpa.meta.IdentifiableTypeImpl<X>
All Implemented Interfaces:
jakarta.persistence.metamodel.IdentifiableType<X>, jakarta.persistence.metamodel.ManagedType<X>, jakarta.persistence.metamodel.Type<X>
Direct Known Subclasses:
EntityTypeImpl
public abstract class IdentifiableTypeImpl<X> extends ManagedTypeImpl<X> implements jakarta.persistence.metamodel.IdentifiableType<X>
Implementation of an identifiable type in a persistence model.

Represents types that have an identity, typically entities or mapped superclasses, and provides access to identifier-related metadata.

Author:
Sudiptasish Chanda
